mapper.sql: unlock_id, user_id, subject_id, level_code, unlock_source, unlocked_by_exam_id, unlocked_at, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_level_unlocks ORDER BY user_id ASC, subject_id ASC, level_code ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_level_unlocks (user_id, subject_id, level_code, unlock_source, unlocked_by_exam_id, unlocked_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{subjectId}, #{levelCode}, #{unlockSource}, #{unlockedByExamId}, #{unlockedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_level_unlocks SET user_id = #{userId}, subject_id = #{subjectId}, level_code = #{levelCode}, unlock_source = #{unlockSource}, unlocked_by_exam_id = #{unlockedByExamId}, unlocked_at = #{unlockedAt} WHERE unlock_id = #{unlockId}
